calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-20-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Henry Karnilowicz.
No appearance by the Defendant: Jean Paul Larosa.
9:30 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Henry Karnilowicz and Bruce Burge, were sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Three day notice------------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises located at 226 6th St., #220, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Rent $2,407.12
Costs per memo of costs.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MATTER ON FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE . DEFENDENT NOT PRESENT. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE NOT HELD.
JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. MAINTAIN TRIAL DATE. PLAINTIFF CSL DAVID MANDEZ AND BRUCE BERG ESQ.
